Plasma_Aldosterone_Low_Day1.description: Plasma aldosterone measurements (mmol/l) taken at 09:00 at low altitude on Day 1 for each of the 15 subjects.

Plasma_Aldosterone_High_Day2.description: Plasma aldosterone measurements (mmol/l) taken at 09:00 at high altitude on Day 2 for each of the 15 subjects.

Plasma_Aldosterone_High_Day3.description: Plasma aldosterone measurements (mmol/l) taken at 09:00 at high altitude on Day 3 for each of the 15 subjects. Used in computing the residual SD for the repeated measures analysis.
